documentedRows.functionality: Wave CRUD API (list, create, read, update, delete)
Blip CRUD API (list, create, read, update, delete)
Topic view with full blip tree
Gadget palette (11 types in grid layout)
Toolbar icons: SVG sprites vs emoji characters
Green left border on unread blips
Wave playback: split pane (content + wave overview)
Wave playback: per-blip diff (same blip comparison)
Mobile layout (device validation on real devices)
Navigation panel (Topics, Mentions, Tasks, Public, Store, Teams)
Navigation panel icons (SVG sprites vs emojis)
Three-state toolbar: click into child = read toolbar
Three-state toolbar: click Edit = full edit toolbar
Click outside inline child = toolbar hidden
Ctrl+Enter creates inline child at cursor position
Inline child editing (Edit button, content persists)
[+] marker: green for unread, gray for read
Insert shortcut button styling (light blue bg, white icons)
Gadget iframe rendering (Yes/No/Maybe poll, YouTube, etc.)
Typed document schemas (wave, blip, topic, comment, read, etc.)
Middleware: request ID, logging, CORS, Helmet, compression
Middleware: rate limiting, session, CSRF, auth, error handler
Route files (auth, topics, waves, blips, comments, uploads, editor, etc.)
Health checks CI job (`npm run test:health`)
Inline visibility (20+ calls → perf mode skip)

captures.label: logged out sign in form
captures.assertion: Unauthenticated session shows OAuth and email sign-in entry points.

captures.label: logged out sign up form
captures.assertion: Sign-up link opens the registration form state.

captures.label: nav topics tab and searchable topic list
captures.assertion: Topics tab is active and searchable topic cards are visible.

captures.label: topics search filter typed
captures.assertion: Search input accepts text and filters visible topic list state.

captures.label: nav mentions tab
captures.assertion: Mentions navigation tab opens its dedicated panel.

captures.label: nav tasks tab
captures.assertion: Tasks navigation tab opens its dedicated panel.

captures.label: nav publics tab
captures.assertion: Publics navigation tab opens its dedicated panel.

captures.label: nav store tab
captures.assertion: Store navigation tab opens its dedicated panel.

captures.label: nav teams tab
captures.assertion: Teams navigation tab opens its dedicated panel.

captures.label: create topic modal open
captures.assertion: New topic action opens the create topic modal.

captures.label: invite participants modal open
captures.assertion: Invite button opens participant invitation modal.

captures.label: invite participants modal filled email
captures.assertion: Invite modal accepts an email recipient before sending.

captures.label: share settings modal open
captures.assertion: Share button opens share settings modal with privacy choices.

captures.label: share settings option selected
captures.assertion: Share settings modal exposes selectable access-state controls.

captures.label: topic gear dropdown open
captures.assertion: Topic gear menu opens and exposes read/follow/export/embed/playback actions.

captures.label: export topic modal open
captures.assertion: Export topic action opens format-selection modal.

captures.label: wave timeline playback modal open
captures.assertion: Wave Timeline opens playback modal with controls/timeline.

captures.label: topic landing collapsed blb toc
captures.assertion: Landing view shows label-only BLB rows and topic chrome.

captures.label: expanded blip read toolbar
captures.assertion: Clicking a collapsed blip expands it and shows the read toolbar.

captures.label: read gear menu open
captures.assertion: Read toolbar gear opens copy/comment/history/paste/link actions.

captures.label: edit toolbar full rich text controls
captures.assertion: Edit action switches the blip into full rich-text toolbar state.

captures.label: edit overflow menu open
captures.assertion: Edit overflow exposes send, copy, playback, paste, link, and destructive actions.

captures.label: emoji picker open
captures.assertion: Emoji toolbar control opens picker UI.

captures.label: mention autocomplete active
captures.assertion: Typing @ in edit mode opens or primes mention autocomplete state.

captures.label: task trigger typed
captures.assertion: Typing ~ in edit mode exercises task insertion trigger path.

captures.label: tag trigger typed
captures.assertion: Typing # in edit mode exercises tag insertion trigger path.

captures.label: right panel gadget palette open
captures.assertion: Right panel Gadgets button opens the gadget palette.

captures.label: done returns to read toolbar
captures.assertion: Done exits edit mode and restores read toolbar.

captures.label: inline comments nav state
captures.assertion: Inline comments control surfaces the comment navigation/filter area when available.

captures.label: per blip playback history modal
captures.assertion: Playback history action opens per-blip timeline modal when history exists.

captures.label: inline marker before click
captures.assertion: Inline [+] marker is visible before expansion.

captures.label: inline marker after click expanded
captures.assertion: Clicking inline marker expands the inline child at the marker position.

captures.label: fold all after hide replies
captures.assertion: Fold control collapses/hides reply bodies.

captures.label: unfold all after show replies
captures.assertion: Unfold control restores reply visibility.

captures.label: right panel text view selected
captures.assertion: Text view is selected in the right tools panel.

captures.label: right panel mind map selected
captures.assertion: Mind map button can be selected in the right tools panel.

captures.label: right panel short mode selected
captures.assertion: Short display mode toggle activates.

captures.label: right panel expanded mode selected
captures.assertion: Expanded display mode toggle activates.

captures.label: mobile authenticated topic navigation
captures.assertion: Mobile viewport renders the authenticated navigation shell and topic area without horizontal overflow.

captures.label: mobile topic content view
captures.assertion: Mobile viewport renders topic content without horizontal overflow and uses mobile layout classes.

captures.label: toast notification component visible
captures.assertion: Toast component renders a visible status notification when the app emits a toast event.

captures.label: real time cursor and typing indicator visible
captures.assertion: A second authenticated editor produces remote cursor/typing UI in the owner editor.
